name: Content Creator Pack
author: Creative Studio
description: Professional writing tools: blog posts, social media, email campaigns, product descriptions, SEO.

skills.name: Write Blog Post
skills.prompt:
Write a professional blog post about: {{input}}

Include: catchy title, introduction, 3-5 sections with subheadings, conclusion, call-to-action.

skills.name: Twitter/X Thread
skills.prompt: Create an engaging Twitter/X thread (5-7 tweets) about: {{input}}

skills.name: LinkedIn Post
skills.prompt:
Write a professional LinkedIn post about: {{input}}
Make it insightful, include 3-5 hashtags.

skills.name: Email Campaign
skills.prompt:
Write a compelling marketing email for: {{input}}
Include: subject line, preheader, body, CTA.

skills.name: Product Description
skills.prompt:
Write a persuasive product description for: {{input}}
Highlight benefits, features, and unique selling points.

skills.name: SEO Meta Tags
skills.prompt: Generate SEO-optimised title, description, and keywords for a page about: {{input}}
